rooms.title: The Spatialize Hack Hall
rooms.theme: Collaborative creation, high-energy coding, and late-night slide deck building
rooms.marblePrompt: A spacious industrial loft with high exposed wooden rafters and warm string lights running across the ceiling. Long black communal work tables are cluttered with modern laptops, half-eaten paper plates of food, and insulated flasks. Bright afternoon sun streams through large glass double doors in the background, contrasting with the warm, golden indoor lights. The atmosphere is focused and kinetic, grounded by polished concrete floors and weathered brick walls.
rooms.rationale: This room represents the physical and mental core of the hackathon—specifically Day 1's intense build phase, captured beautifully by the table setup and warm overhead wooden beams.

memories.label: The Spatial Presentation
memories.note: The spatial web project presentation draft shown on the primary laptop.
memories.rationale: Placed directly in the foreground table zone to match the perspective of working on the slide deck during the hackathon.
memories.objectPrompt: A sleek open black laptop with a glowing screen displaying a minimalist 3D wireframe mesh grid.

memories.label: Hackathon Fuel
memories.note: A plate of Mediterranean falafel and rice eaten while designing.
memories.rationale: Sits on the left side of the primary workspace, serving as a memory of the quick meals taken during continuous coding.
memories.objectPrompt: A paper plate holding a partially eaten falafel over rice, next to a clear plastic cup filled with water.

memories.label: Live Match Stream
memories.note: A background laptop streaming a football match during work.
memories.rationale: Set further back on the left, representing the casual distractions shared among friends during the build.
memories.objectPrompt: A secondary open laptop displaying a miniature green football pitch during a live broadcast.

memories.label: Team Hydration
memories.note: The reusable water bottle kept at the table.
memories.rationale: Positioned as a central pillar on the table, marking the constant presence of personal gear.
memories.objectPrompt: A sturdy blue insulated water bottle with a bold red cap.

rooms.title: The Industrial Stairwell
rooms.theme: Moments of movement and transit between noisy hackathon floors
rooms.marblePrompt: A narrow, functional stairwell descending between levels of an industrial warehouse conversion. The steps are made of dark textured steel grating with safety treads, and the high walls are smooth concrete in deep shades of charcoal and olive grey. Flat, diffuse lighting casts soft shadows, creating a sense of transition and quiet movement away from the bustling event space.
rooms.rationale: This room captures the transitional moment of moving between floors, represented by the staircase snapshot.

memories.label: The Descent
memories.note: The act of walking down to the lower level to explore other teams' projects.
memories.rationale: Placed low near the bottom of the visible stair steps to anchor the sense of downward motion.
memories.objectPrompt: A pair of yellow-soled low-top canvas sneakers resting on a metal-grated stair step.

memories.label: Industrial Railing
memories.note: The raw industrial materials of the venue space.
memories.rationale: Positioned along the left wall path to match the actual handrail that guides visitors through the stairwell.
memories.objectPrompt: A simple dark steel industrial handrail with visible mounting bolts.

rooms.title: The Gathering Hub
rooms.theme: The bustling human energy, networking, and friendships of Day 1
rooms.marblePrompt: An expansive, high-ceilinged warehouse event space densely filled with long black folding tables. Warm Edison bulbs hang from overhead cords, casting a golden light over people, laptops, and snack packaging. In the background, green moss wall partitions offer a touch of color against concrete floors. The atmosphere is bustling, vibrant, and packed with collaborative energy.
rooms.rationale: This room captures the collective social scale of the hackathon, housing memories of the crowd and close friendships.

memories.label: The Hackathon Badge
memories.note: The badge worn throughout the weekend to access the venue.
memories.rationale: Placed near the table edge, mimicking the way personal badges are set aside or worn during work sessions.
memories.objectPrompt: A dark woven fabric lanyard with a clean geometric icon print, attached to a transparent plastic sleeve.

memories.label: The Coder's Pack
memories.note: The gear bag carried from place to place during the trip.
memories.rationale: Resting against the leg of a table to mimic where developers stash their belongings in crowded spaces.
memories.objectPrompt: A matte black heavy-duty nylon backpack with multiple zippered utility pockets.

memories.label: Overhead Edison
memories.note: The warm string lighting that defined the venue's tech-cafe aesthetic.
memories.rationale: Suspended high in the space to represent the moody, warm illumination of the event.
memories.objectPrompt: A single low-hanging filament bulb glowing warmly on a minimalist black cord.

memories.label: Shared Coffee
memories.note: The warm drinks that kept the team energized during long discussions.
memories.rationale: Sits near the workspace corner, symbolizing the shared moments of talking through ideas over drinks.
memories.objectPrompt: A white takeaway paper coffee cup with a simple brown sleeve sitting next to a laptop.

rooms.title: The LA Rooftop Lounge
rooms.theme: An energetic night of clubbing, skyline views, and close friendship in Los Angeles
rooms.marblePrompt: A chic, narrow outdoor rooftop patio in Los Angeles at night, enclosed by glass railings overlooking a sprawling grid of distant city lights under a dark sky. The floor is made of large concrete tiles, and a low concrete planter box with deep green foliage runs along one side. Warm, ambient low-level lights glow from hidden strips below the seating, casting a pink and amber hue across the scene. A dark wooden side table stands nearby, and a glass door leads back inside towards a stylishly dimly lit corridor. The atmosphere is intimate, exclusive, and vibrant.
rooms.rationale: All provided assets document a single social trip and night out in Los Angeles, combining hotel preparation, street dining, and a rooftop gathering. This forms one cohesive memory of a trip.

memories.label: Getting Ready
memories.note: A snapshot of getting dressed up in pink outfits in the hotel mirror before going out.
memories.rationale: Placed on a sleek vanity tray near the entryway to represent the initial preparation stage before stepping onto the roof.
memories.objectPrompt: A small, elegant silver hand mirror lying on a minimalist black lacquer tray.

memories.label: Late Night Bites
memories.note: A candid memory of sitting by a food truck chatting on the streets of LA.
memories.rationale: Located near a corner stool, evoking casual street-side seating and late-night conversation.
memories.objectPrompt: A small, crumpled paper food container with a fresh lime wedge inside.

memories.label: Rooftop Gathering
memories.note: The main group photo of five friends smiling against the backdrop of the illuminated LA skyline.
memories.rationale: Positioned prominently on the main concrete ledge overlooking the virtual skyline view.
memories.objectPrompt: A pair of stylish clear-framed glasses resting on a concrete ledge.

memories.label: Rooftop Friends Portrait
memories.note: A happy snapshot of five close friends enjoying the city views under the night sky.
memories.rationale: Clipped elegantly to the glass safety barrier overlooking the illuminated skyline, bridging the spatial physical boundaries with the captured image.
memories.objectPrompt: A classic white-bordered instant film photo displaying a group of five smiling young friends sitting together on a dark-orange tiled ledge at night.

rooms.title: The Terrazzo Dessert Parlor
rooms.theme: A warm, aesthetic dessert date filled with whimsical sweets and rich matcha
rooms.marblePrompt: A small, intimate corner of a modern dessert cafe. The space features a polished terrazzo-topped table with pastel pink and grey specks under a warm, low-hanging pendant light that casts a soft pool of light. Simple light wood chairs surround the table. In the background, a smooth dust-pink plaster wall creates a minimalist and calming backdrop. A short arched doorway leads out to a dimly lit hallway.
rooms.rationale: The cafe memories are distinctly separate in atmosphere and setting from the high-energy hackathon and nighttime clubbing scenes, representing a cozy afternoon winding down with friends.

memories.label: Panda Mousse
memories.note: A whimsical, adorable panda-shaped dessert that brought playfulness to the table.
memories.rationale: Placed directly in the center of the terrazzo tabletop as the visual focal point of the sweet gathering.
memories.objectPrompt: A highly detailed miniature cream-and-chocolate mousse cake shaped like a sleeping panda, resting on a small dark brown ceramic plate.

memories.label: Artistic Matcha Latte
memories.note: A warm cup of vibrant green matcha latte adorned with delicate leaf art.
memories.rationale: Positioned on the edge of the terrazzo table, mimicking where a guest would sit and sip.
memories.objectPrompt: A simple white ceramic cup filled with a bright green matcha latte featuring clean, white foam leaf art on top.

memories.label: Cafe Conversation
memories.note: A sweet afternoon spent talking, laughing, and sharing treats with close friends.
memories.rationale: Placed on a folded napkin beside the dessert fork, anchoring the casual, warm memory of coffee house conversation.
memories.objectPrompt: A single polished silver dessert spoon resting on a neatly folded white paper napkin.

rooms.title: The Sunlit Campus Veranda
rooms.theme: A bright, playful day hosting a close friend at a creative, modern workplace
rooms.marblePrompt: A small, sun-drenched outdoor office terrace combined with a quirky indoor lounge corner. Warm wooden deck floorboards extend under a large, lime-green canvas patio umbrella that casts soft filtered light. Against an adjacent glass partition wall stands a vibrant, classic red British telephone booth, its glass panes reflecting the bright blue sky. A simple grey metal patio table is set with two modern black wire mesh chairs. A doorway on the left leads back into a polished, modern hallway of the palace.
rooms.rationale: All uploaded items represent a single, cohesive visit from Patryk at the user's Google workplace, capturing the transition, the scenic terrace breakfast, and the playful indoor office art installations.

memories.label: Commuter Backpacks
memories.note: Representing the morning arrival and joint commute to the office.
memories.rationale: Placed tucked neatly under one of the black wire chairs on the deck floor, where bags are naturally set down upon arrival.
memories.objectPrompt: Two dark grey commuter backpacks resting side-by-side with a bright, multi-colored water bottle tucked between them.

memories.label: Terrace Breakfast Spread
memories.note: A leisurely morning breakfast of bagels, fruit, and tea shared under green umbrellas.
memories.rationale: Placed directly on the grey metal patio table at the center of the scene to anchor the social interaction.
memories.objectPrompt: A white ceramic plate holding sliced bagels with cream cheese, a small bowl of fresh berries, and a steaming white mug of tea.

memories.label: Vintage Phone Booth
memories.note: A playful moment of exploration inside the office's quirky interior spaces.
memories.rationale: Placed as a prominent architectural feature against the back partition wall, inviting the visitor to look through its glass panes.
memories.objectPrompt: A miniature classic British red telephone booth with multi-pane glass windows and a gold emblem on top.
